hardBlock.system: App Store Connect + iOS device testing
hardBlock.detail: As of 2026-04-21, repo truth still proves a live 900-family Viet pack, a fully mapped 919-row audio seam, a situation-first pre-build app pass, and repo-side one-time purchase / restore plumbing, but it does not prove fresher device evidence than the 2026-04-16 validation snapshot. The latest known older installable preview artifact remains `ae55c880-0d6b-49b5-ba5e-64d82787eb25` at `1.0.0 (3)`, and it predates the current 2026-04-16 repo snapshot. Preview build `39b7fbfd-909c-48fe-9317-f8be2c5e6e02` at `1.0.0 (4)` and store/TestFlight build `5f61efeb-661d-426b-a280-aed866dcb5c2` at `1.0.0 (5)` remain the current in-flight references from `E:\AI\SpeakLocal-EAS-Build-20260416-viet-preview-r1`; repo truth still does not prove preview installability, TestFlight processing, or Apple-side purchase-lane readiness for that snapshot. The later `2026-04-18` Viet purchase-surface audit and `2026-04-20` Tagalog search-copy rerun improved repo-side honesty only and did not change those blockers. EAS confirmed App Store Connect app ID `6761904350` plus an API key on file, so the remaining blocker is still the exact Step 6 six-item return packet in `docs/operations/VIET_TESTFLIGHT_EXECUTION_PACKET.md`: `Preview-install state`, `Store/TestFlight state`, `Apple-side purchase readiness`, `Physical device proof`, `Shared-search carry-forward`, and `Repo sync decision`.
hardBlock.nextHumanAction: Use docs/operations/VIET_TESTFLIGHT_EXECUTION_PACKET.md as the sole ordered checklist. Return Step 6 with the same six headings and stable field labels, then fold the evidence back in this order: execution packet first, APP_STATUS.md second, TESTING_RUNBOOK.md third if its lane truth changed, this file fourth, CURRENT_BLOCKERS.md only if blocker truth changed, and LATEST_VALIDATION.md only if the durable validation snapshot changed.

blockerDetail: As of 2026-04-21, Viet still has a live 900-family source pack, a fully mapped 919-row audio seam, a refreshed situation-first app shell, and repo-side one-time purchase / restore plumbing, but the current v2 premium flow is still blocked on fresher install, TestFlight, and device evidence. The last known older installable preview artifact remains `ae55c880-0d6b-49b5-ba5e-64d82787eb25` at `1.0.0 (3)`, which predates the current 2026-04-16 repo snapshot. Preview build `39b7fbfd-909c-48fe-9317-f8be2c5e6e02` and store build `5f61efeb-661d-426b-a280-aed866dcb5c2` remain the tracked in-flight build references from the current repo truth; the later `2026-04-18` Viet purchase-surface audit and `2026-04-20` Tagalog search-copy rerun improved repo-side honesty only. The remaining proof is still the Step 6 six-item return packet in `docs/operations/VIET_TESTFLIGHT_EXECUTION_PACKET.md`, using the same six headings and stable field labels.
nextStep: Use docs/operations/VIET_TESTFLIGHT_EXECUTION_PACKET.md as the sole ordered checklist for the next operator pass. Return Step 6 with the same six headings, then fold the evidence back in this order: execution packet, APP_STATUS.md, TESTING_RUNBOOK.md if needed, this file, CURRENT_BLOCKERS.md only if blocker truth changed, and LATEST_VALIDATION.md only if the durable validation snapshot changed.
